title: FloristryWarehouse Frosted Winter Pine Pick With Red Apple, Berries & Cones 20cm/8 Inches
features: Charming winter and Christmas pick – perfect for adding a touch of seasonal magic to your décor.
Frosted artificial pine foliage paired with a glossy red mini apple, berries, and natural fir cones for a lifelike festive look.
20cm (8 inch) height – features a firm, sturdy wire stem for easy arranging and styling.
Versatile seasonal décor – ideal for festive floral arrangements, wreaths, garlands, or even as a Christmas tree ornament.
description: Charming winter and Christmas pick – perfect for adding a touch of seasonal magic to your décor. Frosted artificial pine foliage paired with a glossy red mini apple, berries, and natural fir cones for a lifelike festive look. 20cm (8-inch) height – features a firm, sturdy wire stem for easy arranging and styling. Versatile seasonal décor – ideal for festive floral arrangements, wreaths, garlands, or even as a Christmas tree ornament. Reusable and durable – designed for lasting use year after year. Delivery note: Due to Customs regulations, delivery is limited to the UK and EU only. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate.
